description_en: Ottawa may not be a Muslim-majority destination, but it welcomes Muslim travelers with real halal options. You'll find 116 halal restaurants and 13 mosques nearby, plus real-time prayer times and the Qibla direction — everything to explore Ottawa, Canada, with peace of mind.
metaDescription_en: Halal guide to Ottawa: 116+ halal restaurants, 13 mosques, prayer times and tips for Muslim travelers. Halal Trust Score 3.6/5.
